mapper.sql: select m.member_id, m.dept_id, m.member_no, m.member_name, m.phone, m.age, m.address, m.id_card, m.card_type, m.card_id, m.join_date, m.expire_date, m.total_points, COALESCE(pr.balance, 0) as available_points, COALESCE(sr.cnt, 0) as seckill_count, m.status, m.remark, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time from mem_member m left join ( select r1.member_id, r1.balance from mem_points_record r1 where r1.del_flag = '0' and r1.create_time = ( select max(create_time) from mem_points_record r2 where r2.member_id = r1.member_id and r2.del_flag = '0' ) ) pr on m.member_id = pr.member_id left join ( select member_id, count(1) as cnt from mem_seckill_record where del_flag = '0' group by member_id ) sr on m.member_id = sr.member_id
mapper.select:
select count(1) from mem_member where member_no = #{memberNo} and del_flag = '0'
AND member_id != #{memberId}
select concat(#{prefix}, lpad(coalesce(max(cast(substr(member_no, length(#{prefix}) + 1) as signed)), 0) + 1, 5, '0')) from mem_member where member_no like concat(#{prefix}, '%') and del_flag = '0'
select dept_name from sys_dept where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0'
where m.member_no like concat('%', #{memberNo}, '%') and m.del_flag = '0'
where m.member_no like concat('%', #{memberNo}, '%') and m.dept_id = #{deptId} and m.del_flag = '0' limit 1

where m.dept_id = #{deptId} and m.del_flag = '0' and m.status = '0'
and (m.expire_date is null or m.expire_date >= #{seckillDate})
order by m.member_no
mapper.insert:
insert into mem_member
dept_id, member_no, member_name, phone, age, address, id_card, card_type, card_id, join_date, expire_date, total_points, available_points, status, create_by, remark, create_time
#{deptId}, #{memberNo}, #{memberName}, #{phone}, #{age}, #{address}, #{idCard}, #{cardType}, #{cardId}, #{joinDate}, #{expireDate}, #{totalPoints}, #{availablePoints}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()
mapper.delete: update mem_member set del_flag = '2' where member_id = #{memberId}

update mem_member set del_flag = '2' where member_id in
#{memberId}
